title: Digital Product Launch Playbook — 30-Day System + 50 AI Prompts
subtitle: The step-by-step system to launch and sell digital products. Notion planner included.
description:
Most digital products fail because creators skip the launch. They build, upload, and pray.

This playbook gives you a proven 30-day launch system with a Notion planner and 50 AI prompts.

Notion Launch Planner:
• 30-Day Launch Timeline (daily tasks)
• Pre-Launch Phase (audience warming, waitlist)
• Launch Phase (email blitz, social push)
• Post-Launch Phase (optimization, evergreen funnel)
• Revenue Tracker
• Audience Builder

50 AI Prompts:
• 8 Market Validation prompts
• 12 Content & Buzz Building prompts
• 10 Sales Page & Copy prompts
• 10 Launch Week prompts
• 10 Post-Launch Optimization prompts

Includes the 30-Day Launch Framework:
Validate → Build Buzz → Pre-Launch → Launch → Optimize

Format: Notion template + PDF playbook + prompt guide
Updates: Free lifetime updates
